meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $PPC 166/180 (rem 14d)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $CRDO | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -19.2% | Vol 2.0x | Credo stock tumbles despite Nvidia message on copper
• $UBER | NEWS+BD200 | -11.3% | Vol 1.6x | Uber, Nvidia plan robotaxi rollout in 28 cities starting next year
• $CCL | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -12.5% | Vol 0.7x | ER in 10d
• $CVSA | NEWS+BD200 | -10.9% | Vol 1.4x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $WLDN | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -18.6% | Vol 0.8x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $APP | NEWS+BD200 | -10.8% | Vol 0.7x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $SKYW | NEWS+BD200 | -11.2% | Vol 1.2x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found

[ 🚀 STRENGTH (Above 200-SMA) ]
• $AGX | NEWS+X200 | +59.2% | Vol 0.7x | ER in 9d

🎯 Triggers: APP > 460.40 (EMA21) | CVSA > 101.98 (EMA21) | UBER > 74.84 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Credo stock tumbles despite Nvidia message on copper
focus_view_model.news_summary: Fresh sector commentary reinforced pressure on copper and interconnect names, and CRDO remained under heavy selling despite Nvidia reaffirming copper usage.

logic_pillars.technical: CRDO is in a DOWNTREND, below SMA200 (128.81), below EMA55 (125.19), and below EMA21 (115.43), with a deep -19.2% SMA200 bias.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 2.00, which is the strongest volume confirmation in the breakdown cohort and signals elevated urgency.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Fresh negative readthrough around copper and AI interconnect positioning adds pressure to an already broken chart.

divergence.note: SA Overall remains Strong Buy while price is materially broken below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Do not add unless CRDO reclaims EMA21 (115.43); stronger confirmation would be a daily close above EMA55 (125.19).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Credo stock tumbles despite Nvidia message on copper · today · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Uber, Nvidia plan robotaxi rollout in 28 cities starting next year
focus_view_model.news_summary: A cluster of fresh autonomous-vehicle partnership announcements improved the narrative materially, but the stock still has not repaired the 200-day trend break.

logic_pillars.technical: UBER remains below SMA200 (87.66) but is sitting just above EMA55 (77.75) and above EMA21 (74.84), making it structurally transitional.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 1.65, which confirms the move is being actively repriced rather than drifting.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Multiple fresh robotaxi partnership headlines materially improved the near-term catalyst picture.

divergence.note: Positive autonomous-vehicle catalysts are arriving while the stock is still technically below SMA200.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for sustained holds above EMA55 (77.75); stronger trend repair still requires reclaiming SMA200 (87.66).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Uber, Nvidia plan robotaxi rollout in 28 cities starting next year · 1d · 4 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: US cruises sail into higher costs as oil prices rally; Carnival could be hardest hit
focus_view_model.news_summary: Rising fuel costs are a fresh negative for Carnival and the company is approaching an earnings event, keeping event risk elevated.

logic_pillars.technical: CCL is in a DOWNTREND, below SMA200 (28.68), below EMA55 (28.97), and below EMA21 (27.64).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 0.71, so conviction is not from participation but from event proximity and existing structural damage.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Fresh oil-cost pressure adds a negative macro-to-company readthrough ahead of a near-term reporting window.

divergence.note: Buy rating exists, but the main issue is event-risk concentration rather than a severe rating and price contradiction.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Avoid pre-event adds unless CCL first reclaims EMA21 (27.64); stronger repair would require EMA55 (28.97).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: US cruises sail into higher costs as oil prices rally; Carnival could be hardest hit · 1d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying company-specific catalyst was found in the required window.

logic_pillars.technical: CVSA is still below SMA200 (117.90) but is above EMA55 (104.04) and above EMA21 (101.98), making it a transitional repair setup rather than a clean continuation breakdown.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 1.41, supporting that the move around the EMA cluster is being actively watched.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was identified, so the repair case currently depends on price and volume behavior.

divergence.note: Buy rating and the repair attempt are broadly aligned, but the unresolved issue remains the sub-SMA200 location.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Constructive only while CVSA holds EMA55 (104.04); full higher-timeframe repair still requires reclaiming SMA200 (117.90).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying company-specific catalyst was found in the required window.

logic_pillars.technical: WLDN is in a DOWNTREND, below SMA200 (96.20), below EMA55 (102.87), and below EMA21 (92.25), with a deep -18.6% bias.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 0.81, which means the decline is not being met by strong repair participation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was identified, so the chart damage stands largely unsupported by new positive information.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy while price is materially below all three moving averages.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Avoid until WLDN first reclaims EMA21 (92.25); stronger repair would require EMA55 (102.87).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying company-specific catalyst was found in the required window.

logic_pillars.technical: APP is in a DOWNTREND, below SMA200 (514.58) and below EMA55 (496.97), but very close to EMA21 (460.40).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 0.75, so there is not yet strong participation behind any repair attempt.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was identified, so the setup currently relies on technical stabilization near EMA21.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy while the stock remains below SMA200 and EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Only treat as stabilizing if APP can decisively reclaim EMA21 (460.40) and then EMA55 (496.97).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Argan to announce fourth quarter and fiscal year-end 2026 results on March 26
focus_view_model.news_summary: The company formally scheduled its next earnings release, which keeps AGX relevant even as the chart remains strongly extended above long-term trend.

logic_pillars.technical: AGX is in an UPTREND, above SMA200 (297.44), above EMA55 (401.83), and above EMA21 (442.27), with a very strong +59.2% SMA200 bias.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 0.74, which looks more like orderly consolidation than distribution.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: A formally announced earnings date keeps the name event-relevant despite no sign of technical damage.

divergence.note: Price strength is aligned with the current uptrend structure; the main risk is extension rather than contradiction.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Maintain only while AGX continues to hold EMA21 (442.27); loss of that level would be the first near-term warning sign.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Argan to announce fourth quarter and fiscal year-end 2026 results on March 26 · 5d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying company-specific catalyst was found in the required window.

logic_pillars.technical: SKYW is in a DOWNTREND, below SMA200 (103.84), below EMA55 (99.46), and below EMA21 (96.50).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 is 1.24, so this remains an actively traded breakdown rather than a quiet drift lower.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was identified, leaving price and volume structure as the main reason for inclusion.

divergence.note: Hold rating is not in major conflict with the current broken structure.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for any reclaim of EMA21 (96.50); until then the setup remains a live breakdown under elevated volume.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src
